objective: Increase organic CTR by 20-30% across all ranking content

current_ctr_assets.meta_descriptions: All posts have meta descriptions via Rank Math
current_ctr_assets.title_tags: All posts have optimized title tags

high_ctr_patterns: Number-led: '10 Best X for Y in 2026'
Question-led: 'What is the Best X for Y?'
How-to: 'How to Choose the Best X: Complete Guide'
Comparison: 'X vs Y: Which is Best for Z?'
Review: 'X Review 2026: Is It Worth It?'
low_ctr_patterns_to_fix: Too long: Over 60 chars -> Truncate with intent
Missing numbers: Add quantifiers where applicable
Missing location: Add 'UK' for local intent queries

meta_description_framework.structure: Primary keyword + value proposition + CTA in 150-160 chars
elements: Include primary keyword in first 50 chars
Add unique value: 'Expert tested', 'UK prices', 'Size guide included'
End with CTA: 'Find the perfect X today', 'Compare now', 'Read our guide'
Include numbers: prices, quantities, ratings where relevant

featured_snippets.strategy: Structure answer paragraphs (40-60 words) directly under H2/H3 headers

image_results.current_state: 100% featured images, needs alt text optimization on 72 images
image_results.action: Optimize alt text with descriptive, keyword-rich descriptions

implementation_priority.action: Audit top 100 posts by impressions, rewrite titles using high-CTR patterns
Rewrite meta descriptions for top 100 posts
Add [Updated 2026] or year to titles missing it
Fix 72 alt text issues for image search CTR
Structure featured snippet answers in top 50 posts
Add UK-specific qualifiers to locally relevant content

expected_results.click_increase: If impressions stay constant, +20-30% more clicks
expected_results.compounding_effect: Higher CTR signals relevance to Google, which improves rankings, which increases impressions

status: FRAMEWORK READY - Can execute title/meta optimization immediately, GSC data enables targeted prioritization
